---
title:  
    "Process neutral sequence evolution simulation runs"
date: 
    "February 13th, 2025"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---



```{r}

sim_mut_count <- read.table(file = "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/results/tables/misc/neutral-seq-sim/mut_counts/neutral_simulation_MT-2_1_Majority_9171_180.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")

prop <- read.table(file = "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/results/tables/misc/neutral-seq-sim/proportions/neutral_simulation_proportionMT-2_1_9171_180.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")
```
